subtasks.title: Credential verification
subtasks.description: Look up user by email, compare password with bcrypt.

subtasks.title: Block unapproved drivers
subtasks.description: If role === 'driver' and isApproved === false, reject login with a clear pending-approval message.

subtasks.title: Issue JWT tokens
subtasks.description: Generate short-lived access token and longer-lived refresh token, embed userId + role in payload, set as httpOnly cookies.
